Name: GameModeProfiles
Description: Game Mode profile definitions. Each profile provides a focused gaming plan with its own decision prompts and default selections.

Entries.Name: Casual
Entries.Label: Casual Gaming
Entries.Summary: Conservative gaming quality-of-life with Game Bar support and light tuning.

Entries.Name: Competitive
Entries.Label: Competitive Gaming
Entries.Summary: Low-latency focused picks with explicit overlay and compatibility decisions.

Entries.Name: Streaming
Entries.Label: Streaming / Content
Entries.Summary: Capture-friendly defaults that preserve overlays and streaming helpers.

Entries.Name: Troubleshooting
Entries.Label: Troubleshooting
Entries.Summary: Targeted compatibility prompts for stubborn games, overlays, or flicker issues.
